SEARCH
Package com.krishcpatel.realm.core.event

Class EventSystem

java.lang.Object
com.krishcpatel.realm.core.event.EventSystem
public class EventSystem extends Object
Lightweight internal event bus for Realm.

Used to decouple feature modules from Bukkit listeners. Core code can publish RealmEvents and modules can subscribe to event types.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventSystem(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
    Creates a new event system.

  • Constructor Details

    • EventSystem

      public EventSystem(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Creates a new event system.
      Parameters:
      plugin - owning plugin instance (used for async scheduling)

  • Method Details

    • subscribe

      public <T extends RealmEvent> void subscribe(Class<T> type, RealmEventListener<T> listener)
      Subscribes a listener to a specific event class.
      Type Parameters:
      T - event type
      Parameters:
      type - event type to subscribe to
      listener - handler called when the event is published

    • publish

      public <T extends RealmEvent> void publish(T event)
      Publishes an event on the current thread.

      If any listener touches Bukkit API, this should be called from the main thread.

      Type Parameters:
      T - event type
      Parameters:
      event - event instance

    • publishAsync

      public <T extends RealmEvent> void publishAsync(T event)
      Publishes an event asynchronously using the server scheduler.

      Only use for listeners that do not touch Bukkit API (e.g., DB writes).

      Type Parameters:
      T - event type
      Parameters:
      event - event instance

    • clearAll

      public void clearAll()
      Removes all registered listeners.

      Useful during reload if modules are re-wired.
